import React from "react"; import styles from "./ProductCell.module.css"; import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; import { Product } from "../../../model/productModel"; interface ProductCellProps { product: Product; } const ProductCell: React.FC = ({ product }) => { const { t } = useTranslation<'translation'>(); return (

{product.name}

{product.price !== product.price_new && (

{product.price}

)}

{product.price_new}

{t('compare')}
{t('addToCart')}
); }; export default ProductCell;
